name: Berry's Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. In an 8- or 9-inch square pan, stir together the Basic Brownie Mix, eggs, vanilla, and nuts until all dry ingredients are well moistened.
2. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out barely moist. Do not overbake.
3. Cool brownies on a wire rack, then cut into squares.
Double Chocolate Brownies: Stir 1 package (6 oz) semisweet chocolate chips into the batter before adding walnuts.
Quick-Iced Brownies: Break up 1 or 2 milk chocolate bars into squares. After removing brownies from the oven, place chocolate pieces on top and spread as it melts.
Microwave Version:
1. In an 8- or 9-inch square glass dish, stir together the Basic Brownie Mix, eggs, vanilla, and nuts until all dry ingredients are well moistened.
2. Shield corners of the dish with aluminum foil. Microwave at 70% power for 10 to 12 minutes, rotating the dish if necessary for even doneness. The brownies are done when a toothpick inserted in the center comes out barely moist. Remove foil shields for the last 2 minutes of cooking.
3. Cool brownies on a wire rack, then cut into squares.
